lintSummary.warningNotes: W-FONT = real captured Suisse Intl kept deliberately (fidelity over kit fonts); W-CSSMATH = 2 calc() in <=1340 media block (frozen at authoring width per contract); W-ALT = decorative wedge/art imgs with alt=''; W-SQUARE-BTN = .hdr-start 6px radius kept to match source (maps to text-editor not button widget)

knownDeltas: header in normal flow, not floated over hero (V-POSITION; residual custom_css) - hero art starts below header band
hero circuit art = static raster slices; no parallax/animation; cropped via object-fit <=1340, hidden <=900 (V-BGIMAGE/V-ANIM; residual region-raster+gsap)
components right side (ghost collage + sign-up modal + cursor) = one region-raster; modal not native text (modal = atlas GAP)
dark-band radial glow + circuit backdrop behind auth heading dropped - flat #131316 (V-BGIMAGE/V-POSITION)
auth shead/grid sit ~6-8px high vs source inside the dark band (band edges exact)
logo-wall vertical marquee frozen at captured row of 4 logos (V-ANIM; residual custom_css marquee)
b2b roles/auto-join/invitations + billing app window = region-raster mock-UIs (incl. captured mouse cursor baked in source shot); org-UI pill mark simplified to dark dot
frameworks faint dashed grid extensions/corner crosses simplified to one dashed top row; icon hover color-reveal dropped
testimonial wall bottom cards hard-cut by overflow (source uses gradient fade mask); quote-mark glyph approximated with ldquo pair; tweet author rows are raster crops
footer social icons = single raster strip
wedge transition strips are width-scaled rasters at non-1440 widths (slight squash)
responsive: desktop-pinned - 1250 renders desktop boxes (7495 vs source 8552); 768 single-col stack blows up vertically (15632 vs source 10113); all hover/scroll motion absent by contract
